ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "tshirt_price" REAL /* Price of the t-shirt ordered */,
  "tshirt_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of t-shirts ordered */,
  "tshirt_colour" TEXT /* Color of the t-shirt ordered */,
  "tshirt_type" TEXT /* Type of t-shirt (e.g., T-Shirt, Hoodie) */,
  "tshirt_size" TEXT /* Size of the t-shirt ordered */,
  "campaign" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order was part of a campaign */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., website, mobile app, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing or shipping address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page visit record */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who visited the pages */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated order, if any */,
  "pages_visited" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited by the customer during the session */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "page_path" TEXT /* Path of the pages visited */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the customer */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used by the customer */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., Google, Facebook, direct) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent record */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer associated with the user agent */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the customer's browser */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer */,
  "user_agent_hash" TEXT /* Hashed user agent string for anonymization */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device used */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser used */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system used */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language setting of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_agents_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tshirt_inventory" (
  "tshirt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each t-shirt */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Color of the t-shirt */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of t-shirt (e.g., T-Shirt, Hoodie) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the t-shirt */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of t-shirts in stock */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the t-shirt */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the t-shirt */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tshirt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media, in-app notifications) */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., Active, Completed, Paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Successful, Failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order status record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the order */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "status_change_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated order */,
  "tshirt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the t-shirt in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this item in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_total" REAL /* Total amount for the item (unit price * quantity - discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_tshirt_id FOREIGN KEY ("tshirt_id") REFERENCES tshirt_inventory ("tshirt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_details" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated order */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., Original Payment Method, Store Credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
